title: Quiz: 100 days to go - which nations have qualified for 2026 World Cup?
content:
With 100 days to go until the 2026 men's World Cup, can you name all the nations who have booked their place?

We've given you each nation's football confederation as a clue. There's no timer on this one. Good luck!

Guess the Footballers - play the quiz

Can you name every Champions League winner?

Can you name every EFL Cup-winning team in 10 minutes?

Fancy testing your memory? Playlast week's quizor go to our dedicatedfootball quizzes pageand sign up for notifications to get the latest quizzes sent straight to your device.
